title: Simple SellWand
description:
A SellWand That Sells Everything In A Chest On Right Click
Dependencies:
- EssentialsX
- Vault
body:
------------Simple SellWand------------
Right Clicking On A Chest With This Will:
- Sell Everything In The Chest
- Give you the money
- Send you the total money gained
-----------------------------------------
Plugin Will Not Work Without Dependencies:
- EssentialsX [https://essentialsx.net/downloads.html](https://essentialsx.net/downloads.html)
- Vault [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
------------------------------------------
Commands:
/ssw, /simplesellwand
- /ssw price set [item] [number] (number is how much you want the item to sell for)
- /ssw wand give [player] [wand_type]
- /ssw reload (reloads the prices and config)
-------------------------------------------
Wands:
Default:
100
- 100 uses
Infinite
- Infinite uses

Wands are customizable in the config.yml of the plugin folder
after making a new wand do /ssw reload to register it in the server without having to restart
